ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemon_species" (
  "pokedex_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon species */,
  "type_1" INTEGER /* Primary type of the Pokémon */,
  "type_2" INTEGER /* Secondary type of the Pokémon */,
  "buddy_candy_distance" INTEGER /* Distance in kilometers for buddy candy */,
  "candies_to_evolve" INTEGER /* Number of candies required to evolve */,
  "evolves_from" TEXT /* Name of the species that this Pokémon evolves from */,
  "evolves_to" TEXT /* Name of the species that this Pokémon evolves into */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region where the Pokémon is found */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Generation of the Pokémon */,
  "is_legendary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the Pokémon is legendary */,
  "is_mythical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the Pokémon is mythical */,
  "is_shadow" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the Pokémon is a shadow Pokémon */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the Pokémon in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the Pokémon in kilograms */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the Pokémon */,
  "abilities" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of abilities */,
  "hidden_abilities" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of hidden abilities */,
  "evolution_method" TEXT /* Method of evolution (e.g., level up, trade, use item) */,
  "evolution_item" TEXT /* Name of the item required for evolution (if applicable) */,
  "evolution_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the Pokémon evolves (if applicable) */,
  "evolution_happiness" INTEGER /* Happiness level required for evolution (if applicable) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the species entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the species entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the species entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the species entry was last updated */,
  "extd" TEXT /* Extended data (if any) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokedex_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_type_1 FOREIGN KEY ("type_1") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_type_2 FOREIGN KEY ("type_2") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_generation FOREIGN KEY ("generation") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the type */,
  "type_effectiveness" TEXT /* JSON object containing effectiveness against other types */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Generation associated with the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  "region_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_name" TEXT /* Name of the generation */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the generation */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the generation */,
  "generation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the generation */,
  "generation_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., researcher, trainer, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the commenter */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Pokedex number of the Pokémon species being commented on */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("pokedex_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
